texto: Time is the ultimate form of socialism. Each receives the same amount equally, yet how we manage our time is reflected by our lives. We all can agree, no one comes out equal. For a country to govern by socialism will fail as there will always be the weak and strong. Social justice is fantasy. Nothing can be equal in the end if we have true freedom to choose our own fate. In place of socialism, a government should rule by protection. Protecting the freedoms of each citizen, each of us can choose his own destiny. Some may choose material happiness, while others may choose immaterial joy
explicacao: Orientação direta de Donald Mol sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Time is the ultimate form of socialism. Each receives the same amount equally, yet how we manage …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a felicidade, communism, freedom, útil em momentos de termino e freedom.
